allow: Bash(powershell -c "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess | Select-Object Id, Name, CommandLine, MainModule }" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -c "Get-Process -Id 4684 | Select-Object Id, Name, Path, StartTime" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -c "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter 'ProcessId=4684' | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine, ExecutablePath" 2>&1)
